change.summary: Added test:audio-observability and inserted it into both test:local-gate and test:pages-preview so the audio classification contract is enforced by normal quality gates.

isolated_runtime.scope: byte-equivalent classification module and committed contract assertions

github_status.interpretation: Deployment was not verified; the provider reported a build-rate-limit failure.

falsification_routes: Run npm run test:audio-observability from a fresh checkout and observe any non-zero exit.
Run npm run test:local-gate and confirm the audio contract is skipped or fails to execute.
Inspect commit 61ea35761e98f47ec6f54493cdd80fb17f6a59d5 and verify package.json does not contain the claimed wiring.
limits: No physical iPhone audible/not-audible observation was available.
No successful Vercel deployment identity was produced because the Vercel status failed on build rate limiting.
The isolated execution does not substitute for repository CI or device-level audio output evidence.
